query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.externalId) as total_customers_with_data,
  ROUND(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 2) as total_revenue,
  ROUND(SUM(s.monthlyCost), 2) as total_cost,
  ROUND(SUM(bi.lineAmount) - SUM(s.monthlyCost), 2) as total_margin,
  ROUND((SUM(bi.lineAmount) - SUM(s.monthlyCost)) / NULLIF(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0) * 100, 1) as overall_margin_pct
FROM customers c
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = sba.serviceExternalId;

SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.externalId) as total_customers_with_data,
  ROUND(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 2) as total_revenue,
  ROUND(SUM(s.monthlyCost), 2) as total_cost,
  ROUND(SUM(bi.lineAmount) - SUM(s.monthlyCost), 2) as total_margin,
  ROUND((SUM(bi.lineAmount) - SUM(s.monthlyCost)) / NULLIF(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0) * 100, 1) as overall_margin_pct
FROM customers c
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = sba.serviceExternalId;
